race.description: Lols Comedy Festival 30th May @ Cluden Park Hcp
race.comment: Open race to close out the card. COLOURS OF AUTUMN (4) is a consistent commodity who has hit the top-four at her past ten starts and doesn't know how to run a bad race. Has placed three of four around this circuit and gets 2kg weight relief with the claim. Looks very hard to toss. PRINCE AKEEM (2) is a five-time winner around this circuit and has been racing high on confidence of late. Should be right there at the business end. SAND 'N' POWER (3) strips fitter third-up from the break and  is sure to get a cosy run in transit from gate three. Top-three credentials. HYDE PARK (1) resumes here but showed enough when last in work to warrant consideration in a race like this. Can feature while fresh. KEEP ON RUNNING (6) next in line from the favourable draw.
